notableEvents.label: David Fry GIDP
notableEvents.detail: David Fry grounds into a double play, third baseman Miguel Vargas to second baseman Chase Meidroth to first baseman Jacob Gonzalez. Travis Bazzana out at 2nd. David Fry out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Daniel Schneemann pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Daniel Schneemann called out on strikes.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Steven Kwan singles on a line drive to left fielder Sam Antonacci. Brayan Rocchio scores. Austin Hedges to 3rd. Steven Kwan to 2nd. Fielding error by left fielder Sam Antonacci.

notableEvents.label: Daniel Schneemann pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Daniel Schneemann flies out sharply to center fielder Tristan Peters.

notableEvents.label: Kahlil Watson pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Kahlil Watson singles on a ground ball to center fielder Junior Perez. Steven Kwan scores. Travis Bazzana to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Kahlil Watson walk-off

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Pitcher Gavin Williams picks off Braden Montgomery at 1st on throw to first baseman Rhys Hoskins.
